Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}This station is the gateway to Tatsumi Port Island.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}The building's pretty modern. There's also a monorail with an incredible ocean view.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 418}The students who commute to Gekkoukan High sure are lucky.[n]{f 1 1}
